review_text: Reception-great ,excellent, and bloody good old fashioned service 10/10

Located close to downtown Eden, this campsite features a beautiful beach and is clean. The restrooms and showers were all clean and nice. I highly recommend the Power Site at $42 per night. The reception staff were also friendly.

On arrival we found we had trouble with our Jayco lifting cable and couldn’t stay in our van.The staff were really helpful in directing us to help for the camper and accommodating us in a cabin. Also they were really flexible when we didn’t know how long the repair would take. Really appreciate their helpfulness. Nice spot too.

What a fantastic caravan park! Friendly helpful staff, good facilities and all on a beautiful beach. Management went all out over the Easter weekend by organising live music, a DJ for the kids, pizza truck and a coffee van! Eden is a wonderful place to visit.

We travelled a long distance to come to eden for easter, we decided to give ingenia a go. When we were waiting for check-in we received a call from Ashley which I missed. So I called back thinking it was our cabin was ready, but when I spoke to Ashley she wanted to say that they were still cleaning it. So we went to eden to wait,about 20 minutes later we missed another call, thinking it was our cabin is ready we made our way to the holiday park only to be told at reception that they were still trying to get to it and that it would be another 30mins. We waited and finally over an hour (past check in time) we were allowed to go and sit outside on the beach. We had booked a beach cabin for quite a lot of money. I began talking to one of the cleaners, who made comments that some of the staff were not good at cleaning due to the language barrier.
When we enter the cabin we noticed that the screens were dirty and some of them had huge holes in them which allowed flies to enter and sit on the tables and the kitchen counter tops.  Which to me meant the cleaning that had just taken place wasn't effective. We walked through the cabin only to be met with a mouldy smell and scuff marks on the walls.  The second room had no sheets or pillows on. We walked into the bathroom and once again we were met with the smell.   The whole of the cabin seemed really rundown and out dated, I couldn't believe the rating after being placed in this cabin.
We spoke to the manager and asked for a refund as she stated ( werent going to be offered an upgrade due to it being easter) so the only positive is that she understood and gave us a full refund, thankfully we were able to find a beautiful place to stay 😀 and it was cheaper, cleaner and really beautiful x so if you want great service and a clean beautiful place to stay when in Eden please contact The Eden Motel and you will love it 😀
Finally ingenia ask you to sign a contract it mentions tye use of the pool and other facilities ,when we arrived I asked where the pool was and they said there was no pool. I was quite confused 😕 so I once again. I read through the reviews from previous travellers that had stayed at ingenia and the majority were happy when they received an automatic upgrade from the older cabins to more  newer cabins. My suggestion to the management of Ingenia is to get rid of the older cabins and upgrade to newer so you can improve your rating. I will never stay woth Ingenia anywhere in Australia as they seem to be more interested in the money then giving their guests a wonderful experience. If you are looking for a place in Eden please do not stay at Ingenia but it will be your choice.Hope this helps fellow travellers

We stayed in a beach front cabin.  The beach was perfect and secluded. It was calming hearing  the waves crashing the shore, and extremely peaceful walks on the beach.  The cabin is clean and well maintained.  Highly recommend this place.
We are travelling with a caravan sites are all good

We recently stayed at Ingenia Holidays Eden Beachfront and had a fantastic experience. Our cabin was incredibly comfortable, clean, and well-equipped for a relaxing getaway. You can tell a lot of thought has gone into making the space feel welcoming and easy to settle into.
The views are absolutely impeccable, waking up and seeing the ocean right there never gets old. The direct beachfront access is a huge plus. Being able to wander down to the beach at any time of day, whether for an early morning walk or a sunset stroll, really makes this place special.
The staff were very friendly and accommodating throughout our stay. Late check-in and early check-out were handled smoothly and without any stress, making the whole trip feel effortless.
I would absolutely come back here and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing coastal holiday destination perfect for couples, families, or anyone wanting a peaceful beach escape.

Wonderful van park with more expectations for all to enjoy .. a huge thanks to the reception. Staff member Ashley who went out of her way to ensure  that we would have pleasant stay and we did.
The park is close to the beach and rivers and just minutes away from the main town.. we will stay longer on our next trip.
Loved this park! Great value for money. Girls at reception were lovely. Grassey sites, peaceful location. Loved the individual amenities,  older style but clean and very functional

Fantastic place to stay grounds very well maitained. Own private Beach, great facilities, Staff are fantastic. Highly recommend staying here as we have been staying there for 8 years now and will be going back.

This place is amazing.
So close to the water, and the boat ramp.
Not far away from town..
What more could you want...
Jason is a great host who is also very friendly.. Staff are great and nothing is an issue... Love staying here...
Just wish it could be permanent...
fantastic secluded spot.  Great beach a short drive from town centre.  staff are friendly and park is clean.  sites are big, will definitely be back
We camped. Great location. Quiet friendly

Very good location, next to the beach/lake and close to the nearest town. However, beds were dirty and unmade and furniture was in poor condition. When I tried swapping my dirty towels for new towels the staff gave me a hard time. Will not be coming here again!
We stayed in a self contained cabin on the beach.

Been in the same park for 20 years running . From having little kids now to adults safest park weve ever been in . Office staff more than accomodating exactly as portrayed in immages . Super family oriantated a creek for the young one to a beach for older kids, once you get in youll never go anywhere else. Boat ramps 5 minutes down the road plenty of parking and youll always fill the fish box . 5 stars

Visited this caravan park twice and both times had a terrible experience with the receptionist, Ashley. She was extremely rude, abrupt, and unwelcoming. Instead of being helpful, she spoke down to us and acted like she was on a power trip. Front desk staff set the tone for a place, and unfortunately she left a very bad impression both times. She needs to be spoken to about her customer service.

Very clean & safe holiday destination. You can park your car next to your beach front villa. Only 15min away from shopping centre. If you like the waves sound coming to the shore, this is the one. We will come back again, thank you.

It was great experience we enjoyed the beachfront villa as it was close to beach and well lit at night. The back creek was good for kids bait fishing and prawn netting. Not far from Eden town so you can get your shopping  for food and tackle needs. The friendly staff at Ingenia were fantastic and helpful with advice.

Solid Park. Staff are all lovely and super helpful.

If you're in a tent and don't need / want a powered site or ensuite, I recommend the back two rows on the highway side. A bit noisy from the cars on the highway, and further to the toilets.  But positives oughtweigh this because no other park users waking or driving past, more space, and easy access to taps from any unoccupied nearby powered van sites. Less room if you're on the westernmost row, because of the  trees. But also shade in the arvo when you most want it.

Premium ensuite site was awesome modern clean
Staff friendly great site

I really enjoyed my stay at the powered site with an ensuite. The entire camping area was very clean and well maintained, and the kitchen was well equipped. Customer service was excellent, and the staff made late check-in very easy. The location is great. I highly recommend this place. ❤️
Nice place and amenities are clean.

Terrible!!! They don’t cater for the disabled people! I’m not even in a wheelchair just use a walking stick. I went to use the disabled toilet by reception and it was locked while the men’s and women’s toilets were open. I spoke to them about this and they said I had to get the key from reception first and then return it when I was finished! That means when reception is closed there are no disabled toilets in the entire park! It’s too bad such a beautiful place is managed by people that are unable to emphasise with a person who is 65 has cancer and spinal stenosis. Very sad. I will post this on my Facebook and let everyone I know not to go there. Shame on you!!

Very clean and tidy..staff very helpful  and carring..we had car problems..had to extend  stay a few times..staff very helpful..sites great.big ensuites excellent..we will be back  when down  this way  again..best camp  kitchen  ever seen..cook anything  at all..laundry facilities  great..nice little ⛱️ beach..best location..thanks  for all the help again guys..

Great campground right on the water. Nice cement pads for each site with tarps on the grown so you didn't have to hang out on the grass.

Everything was nice and clean and the biggest kitchen/eating area we have seen.

The front desk was super helpful and check in was easy.

Not a fan of all the flies but all part of the norm when camping and didn't care for the lose Grable/dirt road you had to walk on to the bathrooms. Everything else was nicely paved. . :)
Very good location, beautiful spot next to beach,great staff but one thing that needs to be improved on cleaning, rest is okey

1st time to Eden
This place didn’t miss at all, the staff were very helpful and accommodating to our needs. Everything is within 15-20 minutes away which is a bonus as this place is just out of Eden.
The beach is a stone throw away and great for kids to play and swim. Would book to say here again 9.1/10
Excelent camp kitchen, view, place and  lovely people. Looking forward to stay here again.
Go here every year without fail and it’s only getting better with new additions to the park
Really nice holiday park with a chill vibe. By a beach which is dog friendly which greatly adds to the park.
Very friendly and helpful staff, great spot on the beach. Not the closest camping spot to town but we still had a great stay.
Campsite is kept really well. The bathrooms were pretty good. It was really quiet when we visited so there was no one around us which was nice and private.

Best location, and really friendly and helpful staff. The cabin was roomy and very comfortable. However, everything inside had a weird smell. It smelled like the bedsheets, the linen have not been washed for a while. I was really surprised by that as I usually stay at ingenia and big4 and this the first time i experience this.
Only a stones throw from the beach.. a well maintained park with lots of free BBQ facilities..clean,modern cabins with all the amenities
Just spent 4 nights at your park ,and had the best time, great staff ,very clean ,tidy cabin on the beach front, the grounds are immaculate,  cannot recommend this park enough ,we will be back.
Clean, modern well appointed cabins and staff a friendly and great to deal with. This is our second visit and we will be back again
Perfect location. Cleaned and lot of facilities.

Stayed in mid August and wonderful place to stay especially in winter when it’s quiet and friendly staff.
Right near beach and river. Amenities adequate
Only disappointment was no riding or walking trails to town, although apparently something being done about it.

Extremely good price for site with ensuite. Camp kitchen well its the best I’ve seen on the east coast! Had everything even a slow cooker! Beautiful location. Not too far to drive into town. 4/5 star due to our site being absolutely covered in animal poo. Never saw any kangaroos but looked like their poo. Absolutely everywhere which meant walking it into the van and the ensuite. Could do with maintenance going around and picking it up as it was kinda gross.

Stayed at the park for 3 nights, couldn't  fault  the location with the beach and river, however the showers were disgusting  with mould all over the ceilings not to mention a huge hole which made it very drafty ,found other areas well below standard. Amenities  in dire need of refurbishment.

Beautiful spot. Been to Eden many times, but this was our first stay here. The park management and staff are really lovely, will help you with anything you may need. I can't express how kind and helpful they were. We will definitely come back here, no doubt about it. Thanks everyone ❤️
Cabins are clean well maintained and park caters for all you could need
A beautiful, tranquil, clean caravan park with great facilities right on the beach. We will be back!

Fantastic location, especially for the beachfront cabins, with really beautiful views of a calm, beautiful bay. The amenities are great and the rooms are very good for the prices paid. The kids playground, jump pad and tennis/basketball court were also great. The service at reception was really helpful and friendly, and me and my kids really enjoyed our visit even though it was the middle of winter. Looking forward to visiting in summer some time.

On site vans are away from the beach, facing the river . The services are a bit tired but very serviceable . The camp kitchen is very well appointed- pizza oven and a large commercial type oven inside . Usual BBQ, Microwave , Fridge . Central bins so no convenient smaller bins . Night time braziers light on the beach and supplied with wood
Beautiful location. Staff were lovely. Comfortable and safe park.

We love it here, have been coming for years. On a recent stay we had an issue with our accommodation that was out of the parks control, however Brett in maintenance went above and beyond to fix it for us.  Our stay was beautiful and made even better after the issue was resolved.

Its a great location and so peaceful. Great facilities and private beach.
Very safe park, the kids love the access to the creek and all the wildlife around to explore.  Thanks again for a beautiful stay.

What a brilliant little hidden gem, we stayed during winter but still enjoyed the views and walk along the private beach, the kids loved the open grassy areas and play equipment, we opted for a premium ensuite site, which was  exceptionally clean with instant hot water to shower the whole family.
We Stayed a Night here, absolutely stunning! Would definitely have loved to do a couple nights.. location is incredible! Views and all. Also pet friendly which made it even better 🥰
We got powerd area for our motorvan , very nice place

fabulous location
this large park is right on the beach with lovely grass area with picnic tables
the caravan sites are generous and on grass
the amenities neat and tidy but not as clean as some parks however love the mats to stop the grass clippings on your shoes
The camp kitchen again very nice
a lovely place to stay
Situated on a small private bay/beach with gorgeous rocks and an easy stroll.  Clean sand, clean water -perfect!
Nice quiet park, they need to put some bins around the park. Also need to put numbers on the sites so they can be found more easily.

booked for four but stayed for six because it's so great here. Super friendly and helpful staff. Great facilities. The location with a stream running onto the beach is beautiful and endless stone skipping and swimming to be held by the children. Will definitely be back! Also shout out to Vegas indigenous artist / barista it was faithfully stationed there during our stay.

We had a powered site
Extremely friendly staff .. that seemed working in a happy environment it shows :)
Well the camp kitchen is on steroids it has everything .. cooked a roast lamb one night and cooked a pizza in the pizza oven the next ..
was rainy on some of the days but still a great stay .
Highly recommend

I had an absolutely wonderful stay at Eden Ingenia! The location is amazing with direct access to the beach — it truly doesn’t get better than this. I checked in after hours and the process was so easy and seamless. Anne was so lovely and helpful over the phone, giving clear and simple instructions that made everything stress-free. The cabin itself was spotless, and the kitchen was incredibly well equipped — it had everything I needed and more. I’m already planning my next visit! Highly recommend to anyone looking for a peaceful and well-organized getaway.

Can't rave enough about this holiday park! We stayed here for only 1 night on the way to Sydney. Our cabin was super clean, easy parking, only negative is the bathroom was tiny, The staff are wonderful and helpful. They have a cute coffee van just outside the reception for morning coffee. The beach is just an easy walk, can't recommend this holiday park enough. Definitely staying here again.

The room was average with not very cleaned however the location of the property is beyond our expectation. The river and private beach make this property one of our best choice property for future visit especially with family and kids. Activities within the park along with the river side and beach is outstanding. The campfire option in the evening while enjoying the view of Ocean under open sky is something must to experience. No smart TV in the room only the digital channel so we had to use the free wifi from the property to watch movies over laptop. The property doesn't have swimming pools but in summer time the riverside and beach is good enough to enjoy. This was our second visit to Eden during Easter and will highly recommend this holiday park to families.

Nice park, presented clean and tidy. We were on a grass site situated right near the main road so lots of traffic noise and it had rained the days prior so grass was very spongy and puddles present. Shower curtains in amenities which I just think in this day and age should be gone, they hold so many germs. Lovely space on the water front to site and enjoy the ocean.
Great location and really well maintained . Amenities are ensuite style which  we loved and staff were lovely . Definitely  recommend this park.

It rained while we were here and assume that the caravan park knew it was going to rain, it would have been nice not to have a low lying spot that flooded given that there were plenty of empty spots in higher areas with run-off to our spot. But the staff are great and the amenities are better than we have found at many other locations we have stayed at. Also great camp kitchen facilities.

Fantastic  place  very polite  staff we had an esuite site
We had a great  2 weeks.

Arrived in our caravan to be pleasantly surprised with an upgrade to a powered site instead of unpowered due to nearby roadworks . Great service , friendly staff , clean amenities , beautifully maintained caravan park right on the beach . Fantastic camp kitchen . We loved our stay here !
מקום יפה בדרך , פארק קרוואנים מאובזר וברמה

I must have read the wrong reviews. I stayed at T2 ensuite site and I could not believe the state of the ensuite they charged me for. Yes it’s old but gee, it was so bad we didn’t use it everyday. There was no window. The curtain on the glass door was a sheer net so everyone could see in when the light was on. No bath mat. No fan. No nothing. We had to leave the door open because it was so hot inside during the day, you could not even use the toilet and we had to shower when it was dark so it was a bit cooler. Mould was everywhere. Shame Ingénia. How can you make people pay for such a mess.
The rest of the park is old. The laundry is nearly as bad as the ensuites. You can’t walk to town you have to drive but, the camp kitchen was great as was the location to the beach. DONT GET THIS ENSUITE SITE and you will be ok.
Very pretty by the ocean

Always room for improvement. Cabin we stayed in was a little out dated, and in need of some love. We did have a few issues but unfortunately we're not fixed while on our stay. Amenities plenty, movie room,BBQ dog friendly, but noticed some customers didn't clean up after them.Staff were great,will probably stay next time on the newer deluxe cabins.

Very good
Definitely stay here again.
A great spot just out of town. And ties were clean and lots of space for the caravan. We were on site 38 and loved it. A bit of traffic noise but it didn’t worry us.

Awesome staff they make great advocates for some of the holiday places that I've stayed at over the past year and a half. The amenities and the grounds are so well kept. The public I've met at Ingenia Holiday Park are always so friendly and helpful. Thank you to everyone who participated in a search for the little 🐒 furbabie that escaped. Who was eventually found helping the cleaners and visiting strangers at their awesome waterfront cabins. Well worth booking a few nights plenty to do for everyone. Highly recommended 🏆🥂🐾🦋

Had an ensuite caravan site which was clean & well set out. Kids had plenty of room to safely explore & play. Surprised at how quiet it was being close to the road. Loved having the beach right at our doorstep, felt like we were on our own little island, but so close to town for supplies.
Waren in einem Mobilhome untergebracht, sauber und ordentlich eingerichtet, Personal sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit

Great spot with its on beach area, kids area great and well kept. Food van onsite has great donunts, which go good with a coffee. Good fishing off the rocks on the beach and plenty to catch. Staff friendly and helpful, onsite security. Short drive out of Eden's town centre, not to much noise from the highway and trucks through the night. Will be booking again

Cabin wasn't at all clean. Lots of ants, rubbish under one of the beds, crumbs/biscuits under the couch and the floors weren't mopped. Feet were black after walking on them for a few minutes. Main bedroom was small, couldn't walk around the bed, could barely find a place to put a small suitcase. Bathroom was tiny and poorly maintained. Won't be staying here again

Great camping place with his own beach front. Our campsite for our tent was on the small site. Amenities old and dated but clean. Location is great with only a short drive to town. Great if you like fishing and/or have a boat. If you don't, not much to do .

Just wonder why no abc  or sbs on the TV at night. Sky news has to go, I feel like I am in Gilead.
But the holiday was great...lovely cabin , beach great and we hit the best weather.

Great place to stay, but still room for improvement toilets only get cleaned like 1 or 2 a day so there dirty most of the time. And toilet blocks are outdated, shower head falls sometimes, water pressure is bad. Also the laundry system there has bo hot water leaving your clothes with stains some times and takes almost 1+ for clothes to dry in the dryer. Also when it rains camp grounds flood with water and  can be a safety hazard due to electric items like. The camp kitchen is good although giving people on no power sights somewhere to cook food.
It's one of the best holiday locations in Eden NSW. Cabins are clean and have everything you need. beach View was amazing from our cabin. You have a river & the beach. No need to go anywhere.

Absolutely beautiful place. The beach and river are absolutely stunning and almost private as its only accessed via the park. Cabins look like they are undergoing renovations and hopefully the road surface will also be repaired soon. Small but decent play area, jumping pillow and courts. The grounds are extremely well kept and the amenities are very clean. Definitely a place to visit!

Fantastic place to stay very relaxing and short trip to eden will defently come again,we had issues with the car one day before departing the reception staff was going to organise longer stay for us during a busy time if needed so helpful and understanding that's professional,thxs guys this is one caravan park that gets the big tick 10/10 for service, quality and a great stay.
Third time here great little place some upgrades since last time really enjoyable at a good price.

I want to say thanks to management for sincerely considering my current financial circumstances and refunding me my first full accom deposit, when they didn't need to. Helps alot at the moment when unexpected cancellation. Cheers to making this world that little bit more empathic..
Great place to stay in Eden. Right on a very small quiet beach about 4 KMs out of Eden. Rooms are very clean and well equipped...
Great place, dog friendly, beach and creek to walk along.
lovely facilities, everything was very clean and the camp kitchen was great! Would come back again 🙂

Had a powered van sties.
Exelant service from the receptionist.
Easy site to park in ( drive through)
Clean amenities block.
Had and used the unlimited WiFi that was available after logging in with booking number and email address.
Would definitely stay there again.
Originally booked for one night.
Then booked a second night then were off ered a 3rd night  for $19 which we accepted.
From our drive through site we have a direct view to the beach and found it quite peaceful and hearing the waves nearby while going to sleep 😴

LOOOOVED IT.

Good 🛜 and great common area with new kitchen appliances, they even gave a pizza oven!!!
Just a second away from the beach and great loo facilities.

Great value for the price, and smooth after hours check in.

I would give this holiday park ten stars if I could we did not want to leave. The location is stunning and learning about the historic history of whaling was incredible. Eden is a beautiful town and so are the people. Visit the Whaling Museum and as Trish told us watch the short documentary first before viewing the museum itself. .
Ingenia exceeded our expectations on every level. Facilities were excellent and our cabin was perfect. We could hear the waves lapping the shore. Would definitely stay there again if going that way.

Stayed here with friends and family
Wish I could have booked for more nights. Some sites has narrow parking and need a little bit of manuoer.

Was stayed for one night in a standard cabin. Very disappointed with the quality of the room considering the price tag. Unmade beds, poor cooking facilities and no room to move in the bathroom or main cabin area. Lucky it was for one night and we couldn’t wait to get out. Very disappointed and we won’t return.

Ingénia Holiday Park in Eden is a true slice of paradise. From the moment I arrived, I felt welcomed and at home. Ashley at the reception was incredibly kind and helpful, going above and beyond to ensure my stay was perfect. The park itself is stunning, with beautiful surroundings and plenty of amenities. The fact that I was able to enjoy it with my Service Dog made the experience even more special. I can't wait to return to this wonderful place and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway.
Vero & Cookie 🐾❤️

Booked a onsuite tent site at Eden. Its far to close to others especially if you get the onsuite camp. Super noisy campers and road with trucks grinding the brakes all night the noise ruined my stay. It wasnt even busy as off season.
Security lights on all night.  If you want peace and tranquility give this place a miss
This place was amazing nothing more beautiful

A great quiet and secluded location with nice facilities and very friendly staff.
We got a beachfront cabin.
Good location and great views but a bit disappointed with the quality.
Quite a few things didn't work but we still managed without.

The campsite is in a fantastic location on the beach and alongside a creek full of birdlife. The amenities were excellent with a huge kitchen and the bathrooms also very good. Slightly out of town from Eden but it was a short drive to get into town.
I stayed only for a night, so won't be able to say much. The rooms were okay. Met all our needs. One Split AC was enough for all 3 rooms. Nice scenic view, if you get the booked room near

Fair pricing. Very helpful Ashley on reception. Phil also very helpful. So five stars.

N.B. EVs: Powered campsites are only five amp. Also, the earth pin on a common household plug aremaller than the earth pins for caravan plugs. So get an adapter otherwise your plug may not earth properly. Ring and ask Ashley who organised a one off loan from Phil for me.

完美
前台很热情
我们晚上才到 前台提前打电话询问到店时间
得知我们晚到 发信息和email给我们相关的入住信息
晚上我们到达的时候根据她提供的保险箱（在reception门口）的密码打开保险箱拿到营地地图和钥匙
cabin小而温馨 麻雀虽小 五脏俱全 该有的都有
海边就近在咫尺
绝美了宝子们
价格便宜 如果还有机会来eden 还会选择住在这
Best caravan park I have stayed at. $29 for an ensuite powered site was to good to be true

The room is clean. The camp is big and just at seaside. Unfortunately, it is cloudy and not able to see the sunrise. There is nothing on bunk bed when we checked in but the bedsheet and pillows are available in the cabinet which we have to make up a bed for ourselves.
Really nice caravan park right on the water. Good level sites with easy access. A couple of ks out of town but that didn’t bother us. Great camp kitchen. Would definitely stay here again

Stayed here for 8 nights on a powered site may 2024. Staff extremely accommodating and friendly. Facilities beautifully kept and clean. Definitely recommend. Only 5 mins from town. Thank you guys for a great stay.
Very friendly and helpful reception. Great cabin and pool area
So close to the beach and many activities for kids! Loved it!
Zimmer nicht genutzt wegen Wohnmobil

Great location for day trips in and around Eden.
Little private beach is very magical & you can hear the waves at night.
Staff are warm and friendly.
They laundry is good value for money $5 for washing and drying.
The main facilities are serviceable however they do need a bit of TLC as they are old and dated.
Beautiful location and just outside Eden
We will definately be booking again.

We stayed at a powered campsite, with the ensuite shower/toilet. The site was lovely and green, the ensuite could do with an update, but was clean and adds a touch of privacy while camping. The atmosphere is friendly with a community feel, I had many conversations with fellow campers during my stay. The staff was lovely and friendly as well, and the camp kitchen facilities where fantastic. The beach it is located off is beautiful. Perfect for an afternoon stroll, or a quiet drink at the tables provided on the grassed area.  I will definitely be returning.
Great little park with some really nice sites, book ahead though
Great service great view and awesome staff

Such a lovely place, we truly loved it. The jumping pillow was an absolute highlight for the kids, and I liked that they brought in a food van for dinner.||The beach is absolutely amazing! Not sure if strictly a private beach, but people don't go there. What I liked about it was how calmer it was compared to nearby Aslings beach in Eden, that had much stronger waves all throughout the week so clearly not a local weather issue.||Cabin was ok. Mozzie net had a huge hole in it, but to be honest wasn't bit even once even while sitting outside so didn't matter. Vent fan in the bathroom was very noisy unfortunately.

Had a lovely stay. Very family friendly. Kids loved the beach and jumping pillow. Stayed an extra night. 5 nights in total. Could hear the waves at night even though wasn't in a beach front cabin. Very spacious park. Loved it was out of Eden but not too far out, easy to get into town for things. Would stay again. Lovely private beach  ⛱️.
It is not that great in my opinion, like the cabins, perhaps if i took the villa instead, it would have been a better experience.

Brillant place to stay. Clean , quiet with a brillant beach.
Perfect for families.

We stayed 7 nights here and absolutely loved it. The staff were friendly and couldn’t do enough for us during our stay. As we are travelling for twelve months, I brought my business on the road with me - Her Soul Temple, Ayurveda. The staff were wonderful letting me set up the treatment tent and work for the week. We are very grateful for such a wonderful place to stay and for all you did to support us. We will be back :)

Dissapointed.
$79 a night for 2 people and ridiculously tiny sites! Not all are like this but there are quite a few that are so check when booking. Tired amenities and the ensuite blocks do not look appealing. We saw 2 box Jellyfish were in the water out the front of the park so keep an eye out.
Very nice place, friends staff and extremely clean and tidy. We loved it
Excellent location, staff are great to deal with and extremely helpful

Powered site, enough room for Tent and gazebo/awning or caravan etc, the cabins are excellent as are the sites with ensuite, 2 public bbqs just off the beach, excellent common areas, clean toilets and showers.
Beach is excellent for a swim or a fish.
Highly recommend this caravan Park

Location is great. Right on the beach and only a 5min drive into Eden. The only negative was cost of p/site at $97 per night and not enough width so we couldnt put awning out unless we parked on top of the neighbour.
Bathroom need to be refurbished.

Great location with nice ocean view and beach access.
Staff were friendly and very flexible so that I could change my booking date close to the booked time. They also changed my site with a private shower/bathroom as bonus.
It was a bit crowded, though.
Thank you, Ingenia holiday park.

Hubby and I stayed overnight at Eden Beachfront on our way up to QLD and loved it so much that we booked 3 nights on the way home from QLD. The park staff are so lovely and amenities are clean. The river & beach are just right there and so beautiful. Close to town ... We will definitely be booking for a much longer stay next time... very impressed

Our first visit to the area and we were pleasantly surprised by the natural beauty of Twofold Bay. After 5 days we still had a lot to explore and will book a longer stay next time. Jason, Karen and Ashley was very nice to deal with and they made us feel welcome from the first contact.
The resort is well looked after and has a great location with it's own 'private' beach. Shadrachs Creek offers some fishing and is a safe area where the kids can explore and get away from their screens.
Love it here!! Staff very friendly and happy to help beautiful place ❤️
Beautiful quiet spot on the creek and ocean.
Great small holiday park. Cute beach. Big camp kitchen.

Shared fridge in the kitchen was smelly and full of mouldy food including one big pot that had mouldy seafood in it. It was obvious that these items have been left in there for sometime and the fridge doesn’t get monitored by staff members.

Our cabin was E61, right on the corner with views of the sea and the river inlet. It was a fabulous location and incredibly peaceful. The cabin had everything you needed and was well equipped. The double bed was so comfortable and the linen was lovely and fresh. The bunk bed was also very comfortable according to my travelling companion. The staff were really friendly and helpful. I forgot my phone charger and they lent me one which was a  real bonus as we all rely on our phones so heavily these days.
We had a brilliant 4 night stay at an incredible price.
Facilities included, a book exchange, a nice room where large groups of people could gather. A BBQ, a laundry and spaces for tents and campers.
There was even a place you could your car.
Thank you to all the staff who obviously work hard to ensure their guests have a wondwrful stay.

Carol From the UK.
Perfect,  great.  Cabin was big inside, very clean.  Bathroom, toilet, shower inside the cabin.  Bed and sheets very nice inside cabin.

My friend and I spent a few days at this magical location and can't wait to return one day. We had a van and the river front view and short walk to the beach was wonderful. The lovely ladies at reception were very welcoming and friendly so being in customer service all my life before retirement - I always like good customer service. This park was everything and more than what we could've hoped for. Thank you for making our stay very memorable 💖

We stayed a week here and it was so quiet and peaceful. The staff couldn't do enough to help and the location with the river and beach was amazing. Fabulous wreck room and amenities. Only for the convenience of the people staying in the park, I would recommend to have rubbish bins positioned around the place instead of having them in one location only.
I would definitely come back here. Great Park!!!

We were staying with friends in our own caravans. On the foreshore caravan sites. They were great spots, unfortunately the weather wasn’t kind to us. We stayed 5 nights and it rained for 4 days and 5 nights 🙄 but you can’t plan weather. You would think late November in NSW it would be ok. Sadly no! There was really only one major issue we found, the toilet block was a long way away from the camp, especially when raining. Would have been great if it was nearer the laundry, closer for that area.
But we’ll be back, this was our second visit in 2023   See you next yeah 👍
Simple, clean and a beautiful place

Park was clean and well maintained, staff were friendly and welcoming. Location was a 10/10. It's almost like they have a private beach just a stroll from the park. Could hear the water from the cabin. Great thing is beach is in a Cove so very little waves so great for kids. Definitely coming back.
The 2 lot that was assigned to us are huge for our camping gears. Plenty of space to play around. 5 star.
We unfortunately had a breakdown here, but the staff were very helpful with recommendations for repairers, extending our booking and checking up on progress.

Friendly lady at reception, gave us a choice of 2 sites, 1 was all grass, but very close to main road and kids jumping mat, 2nd was mainly gravel, took the gravel as did not want to hear trucks  all night

This is absolutely fabulous location comfy cabin complete with BBQ and outdoor kitchen perched on the edge of the bay about 4 Kms from Eden. Fully equipped with 2 bedrooms and would suit a family with 2 or 3 children.
Another great spot.

Our favorite holiday park. We caravan by the river which runs into private Beach. Excellent facilities, very good staff and great camp sites. We just enjoyed a very generous, complementary Melbourne Cup lunch. A very thoughtful gesture by management. We have been coming here for many years now and never had a bad experience.
Highly recommended place to rest and enjoy nature.
Stayed in cabin opposite the creek with dog. Beautiful cabin with all facilities. A dog friendly private beach about 200m from cabin. Quiet park. Friendly staff.

The park and site we had suited our needs and taste. We found the staff were very friendly and the receptionist who booked us in was very accommodating and welcoming. The amenities were clean and the camp kitchen was excellent. There was a basic playground for kids if you had any, but no water parks, but the park has its own small beach. We extended our stay as we enjoyed our time there

Absolutely beautiful place to stay, will definitely back! And with only a few minutes drive into town it's in the perfect location. Private beach with plenty of space to explore and swim. Happy friendly staff ready to help with any queries, Just all round great place to stay, highly recommended 😁 👍🏼
Great staff!
Lovely place to stay nice and clean everything I needed in cabin
Very clean facilities. Great spot on the beach, close to town

We have just stayed a week in a beach front cabin and my in-laws stayed 2 doors up from us in a beach front caravan site.
Our view was a 10/10 and the cabin was 10/10 for location and cleanliness.
The beach was a 10/10 too!
Comfy beds and a lot of space!
We will be back next year and I’m already counting down the days!

Great Beachfront location just out of main town. Peaceful on creek with beach attached to park.
The park is a great pet friendly park.
I note many updates are occurring throughout the park so can only see it will continue to improve.
Clean friendly safe park would recommend to anyone great for families great staff

We had a creek front cabin which is dog friendly, and was pleasantly suprised to find it had been newly renovated! It was perfect,clean,  awesome bird life on our back door, with the beach like 20 meter walk, nice and quiet , great for families. Staff are super cruisey and polite.|
Amazing location in a clean and comfortable cabin at a great price.

My husband and I stayed for five nights.  We were given a lovely welcome on our arrival be two lovely ladies.   We were all set for a beautiful long awaited break away.  On arrival in our Deluxe Villa beach front cabin (happy to had paid extra  for I may add ) we're very happy with seeing our modern and newly renovated cabin to stay and for a perfect spot to stay .     However,  the matress in the main bedroom was exseamly hard and uncomfortable,  old springs stuck in my back all five night and left us both with very sore a stiff backs for our hole time in Eden , Inpacked hugely on what should've been a great break away ,  so not a relaxing or enjoyable time , just very very sore stay .  Sad to have had to write this review. 😞   Loretta and Michael Mclaughlin.

Loved the bay view!
The cabin was also 👍 would definitely recommend for your stay if you like camping.
Amazing customer service from the minute we checked in!

Fabulous location. A short drive to the shops in Eden but the highlight was the beach. Something for everyone, still water and beachline. A perfect place to relax and wonderful facilities for people with dogs.

Idylic
Having stayed a Seahorse Inn for 2 nights on our way to Kiama, we stayed here on our way back and must say, that it was superior in every way. The cabin was spacious and the view of the water from the inside of the cabin was unbelievable. Furnishings were lovely and amenities were all you could ask for. At the same time, there was no coffee table which was strange
given the size of the cabin and the lounge suite. There was also no hairdryer. None of these were deal breakers though. Gorgeous Parakites visit who will happily eat out of your hand, as well as lovely little sparrows, magpies, and seagulls. A wonderful experience at a very reasonable price and we will be back.

I didn't rate the rooms as we had a powered site.
So impressed with this place, the managers were lovely and very hospitable.
The park is just beautiful and the location is amazing, one of the nicest beach fronts Iv seen to date for a park.
Would definitely recommend this park to stay at for sure.

Would highly recommend this park. When we arrived at Eden and we were turned away from the accommodation we were supposed to stay in, Ingenia Holidays Eden were good enough to give us a cabin despite claiming they were fully booked. It wasn’t a fabulous cabin, but it was a roof and a bed.
Peaceful and husband just loves the fishing
caravan site one row back from off lead beach
very good will be back again
A great place to stay - made very welcome at check in - will be back.
Fabulous park. Lovely staff. Loved my stay.
Off season not crowded, beautiful.
Great powered site, nice and quiet and close to the river and beach.
Pulled in for over night stay and it was one of the best caravan parks very clean and we we're very impressed with the park we will definitely be going back for a week stay.
Very average park needs alot of TLC
Camped here for a few nights awesome spot .well set up camp kitchen even for winter with a fire 🔥  going.
Super friendly staff,great location. Dump point,bins and amenities are a bit far away but very clean and modern.highly recommend this park its in a great spot

Seriously great place to stay. We are travelling in a simple self sufficient van so only needed an unpowered site. Reception staff were so accommodating and helpful, advising us of the most suitable site for us. Beachfront location superb and kitchen super clean and organised. Even a cosy fire burning away when we arrived. Highly recommend.
